metadata: _Reply context:_ SCAM ALERT - "Annual Access Pass" , We want to bring awareness to a new scam email some users have been receiving This email congratulates the user for staying loyal to Star Atlas , This email offers the "Annual Access Pass" , This email IS NOT from the Star Atlas team or anyone affiliated with the Star Atlas team. , If you receive an email similar or the same as the one shown in the images here , BLOCK AND DELETE , STAY SAFE @everyone - ALWAYS CONFIRM ALL TRANSACTIONS ARE LEGIT - IF YOU ARE UNSURE, ASK A MOD OR TEAM MEMBER!!
